assessment.note: He names a specific Principal-scope gap — staying in his lane rather than driving cross-team decisions — which signals strong role-clarity weakness.

new_queue.label: Visible leverage
new_queue.name: Where have you actually shaped a cross-team decision recently?
new_queue.description: Anchors the conversation in a concrete example of visible leverage or its absence.

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?
new_queue.description: Tests whether they can name their own gaps before the manager does.

new_queue.label: Questioning cadence
new_queue.name: What tends to stop you from asking a question early?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the pattern behind low early alignment and whether it is habit, context, or caution.

new_queue.label: Next signal
new_queue.name: What would you want me to see differently by our next check-in?
new_queue.description: Closes on a specific behavioural change or visible signal without opening new topics.
